title: RAG with Citations
summary: Offline retrieval that cites sources like an adult, not like a model vibes-printing footnotes.
hints: Token overlap is primitive; deterministic rerank rules are how you avoid flaky tests.
The validator looks for `doc-widget` and actual substring overlap in `snippet`.
If two docs tie, break ties with a stable secondary key — priority, then id.
acceptance: Widget queries surface `doc-widget`; Runnable jargon surfaces `doc-lc`
